name: WPG Holdings Limited
summary: WPG Holdings Limited distributes semiconductor, electronic, and electrical components in Taiwan, Mainland China, and internationally. The company provides core components, such as chipsets, graphics/audio/video controllers, smartphone chips, network/modem chipsets, CPU/MPU, RISC CPU, etc.; analog IC and mixed signal components, including bipolar, CMOS operational amplifiers, comparators, digital/analog converters, power supply controllers, audio and video amplifiers or controllers, etc.; and discrete logic IC components comprising of diodes, rectifiers, transistors, thyristors, insulated-gate bipolar transistors, optical transistors, logic ICs, etc. It also offers memory components, such as DRAM, SRAM, EPROM, EEPROM, flash, MCP, etc.; optical components, which includes LCD, sensor, LED, etc.; and passive components, connectors, and magnetic components, including resistors, capacitors, inductors, magnetic components, cables, connectors, mechanics, electro mechanics, circuit protection, materials, batteries, filters, oscillators, etc., as well as non-electronic components. In addition, the company operates children theme parks; and engages in the investment activities and general trading business. Further, it offers various value-added services, such as special delivery, market information, technical support and tools, financial support, turnkey solution, warehousing, logistics, and e-commerce services; and computer software, computer and its peripherals, and information products. WPG Holdings Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
